tracks.rawText: 5:21Volvimos a Coincidirv5.5Epic regional mexicano ballad, Alejandro Fernández style, powerful emotional male vocals, deep and expressive tone, gradual build from soft intimate verses to explosive passionate chorus, rich orchestration with strings, mariachi elements (violins, guitarrón, vihuela), dramatic dynamics, emotional vibrato, cinematic atmosphere, slow tempo around 70-80 BPM, strong vocal presence, heartfelt delivery, live concert feeling, reverb-rich vocals, emotional peaks, nostalgic and powerful mood3PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:48Midnight Swingv5.5Core sound: Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electronic, and global rhythms, Built around groove, emotional impact, and cinematic atmosphere, designed for both dancefloor energy and deep listening experiences, Lyrics & mood: Hybrid storytelling that moves between introspection, sensuality, ambition, and transcendence, Hooks are immediate and memorable, often chant-driven, with a balance between poetic depth and viral simplicity, Production palette: Deep sub-bass, textured percussion, offbeat grooves, evolving synthscapes, and spatial FX (delay, reverb, modulation), Frequent use of contrast: minimal vs explosive, silence vs impact, analog warmth vs futuristic digital textures, Language & vocals: Bilingual flow (English/Spanish) with global accessibility, Vocals range from melodic, hypnotic singing to rhythmic, charismatic delivery, Focus on identity, tone, and presence over perfection, Artistic direction: Not bound to genres — each track is a world, Design1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Midnight Swing

tracks.rawText: 4:22Guira Chromev5.5CoverSpy-swing luxury cumbia at 104 BPM: guiro, tambora, and clave locking a skippy dance groove, with upright bass tumbao, muted jazz guitar stabs, brushed snare, and brushed ride cymbal, Add wah trumpet, smoky sax riffs, vibraphone, and lush string pads with tape warmth for a sleek nocturnal finish3PublishRemix
